diagnosticsRegistry.canonicalMessage: Designer workflow trace upstream evidence is missing.
diagnosticsRegistry.suggestedAction: Restore accepted P2, source-conformance, P3, P4, protocol, and native evidence before regenerating the trace.
diagnosticsRegistry.trigger: Required designer workflow trace evidence or artifact input is missing

diagnosticsRegistry.canonicalMessage: Designer workflow trace upstream evidence or artifact hash does not match accepted evidence.
diagnosticsRegistry.suggestedAction: Restore accepted P2, source-conformance, P3, P4, protocol, and native evidence before regenerating the trace.
diagnosticsRegistry.trigger: Required designer workflow trace evidence or artifact hash does not match the accepted boundary

diagnosticsRegistry.canonicalMessage: Designer workflow trace fixture references a component outside the selected trace scope.
diagnosticsRegistry.suggestedAction: Keep the first designer workflow trace scoped to the accepted Button catalog component.
diagnosticsRegistry.trigger: Trace fixture references a component outside the selected scenario scope

diagnosticsRegistry.canonicalMessage: Designer workflow trace fixture omits a required target handoff.
diagnosticsRegistry.suggestedAction: Keep both implemented static handoff targets in the trace fixture.
diagnosticsRegistry.trigger: Trace fixture omits a required target handoff

diagnosticsRegistry.canonicalMessage: Designer workflow trace preserves review-required or blocked status as indexed evidence.
diagnosticsRegistry.suggestedAction: Preserve review-required and blocked statuses as indexed evidence.
diagnosticsRegistry.trigger: Trace fixture requires review-required and blocked status to remain visible in the index

diagnosticsRegistry.canonicalMessage: Designer workflow trace fixtures cannot claim product workflow implementation, customer validation, production adoption, live integrations, production adapters, APIs, SDKs, runtimes, A2UI, P6, or P7.
diagnosticsRegistry.suggestedAction: Keep the trace proof-only; add a target proof before claiming live or production behavior.
diagnosticsRegistry.trigger: Trace fixture claims product workflow implementation, customer validation, production adoption, live behavior, A2UI, P6, or P7

diagnosticsRegistry.canonicalMessage: Designer workflow trace evidence hash does not match generated artifacts.
diagnosticsRegistry.suggestedAction: Regenerate designer workflow trace artifacts from accepted evidence.
diagnosticsRegistry.trigger: Designer workflow trace evidence hash differs from generated artifacts
